title: HTML Accessibility and Review Checkpoint
description: Retrieval practice for this chapter. Explanations appear after submission.

questions.question: What is the first rule of ARIA?

options.text: Prefer native HTML when it provides needed semantics

questions.explanation: Native controls include behavior, focus, and semantics by default.

questions.question: Why can DOM inspection differ from source HTML?

options.text: Browsers repair malformed markup while parsing

questions.explanation: HTML parsing includes defined error recovery.
